hooks.command:
bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo "
---
## Review — $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
" >> planning/REVIEW.md && git diff HEAD --stat >> planning/REVIEW.md && echo "
### Diff

\`\`\`" >> planning/REVIEW.md && git diff HEAD >> planning/REVIEW.md && echo "\`\`\`" >> planning/REVIEW.md'
